goal: Add a side-effect-free BPK branch merge/release sequencing planner that orders BPK branches, detects missing predecessors or non-green checks, and emits release-note sections. Do not perform git merges, pushes to main, GitHub API calls, package changes, runtime changes, deployment changes, frontend changes, or external service calls.
scope_out: Do not merge branches, push to main, create PRs, call GitHub APIs, or change workflows.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, deployment notes, runtime routes, provider calls, database writes, GitHub writes, or frontend files.
Do not change BPK-008 through BPK-010 semantics.
claims: BPK branch merge order can be planned deterministically without executing git operations.
Missing predecessors, blocked candidates, and failing checks block release readiness.
Review-required candidates keep the release in review state.
Release-note sections can be generated from branch metadata.
assumptions: Actual PR creation, merge, and deployment remain human/operator-controlled.
Branch metadata is supplied by a caller or operator, not fetched in this block.
BPK-008 through BPK-010 are the current requested release sequence.
dod: builder/src/bpkBranchMergeReleaseSequencing.ts exports side-effect-free sequencing types and planner.
The planner returns ready, review_required, or blocked with deterministic blockers and ordered branches.
The planner detects missing predecessors, duplicate task IDs, blocked candidates, and failing checks.
builder/tests/bpkBranchMergeReleaseSequencing.test.ts covers ready order, review state, missing predecessor, failing check, duplicate task, and no-mutation behavior.
review-packets/BPK-011.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused sequencing test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A real merge, PR creation, GitHub API call, workflow change, deployment change, runtime change, package change, or frontend file becomes necessary.
Changing BPK-008 through BPK-010 behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-008 through BPK-010 prepared runtime adoption, cockpit adoption, and AICOS card intake as pure contracts. BPK-011 should sequence their branch merge/release path without executing merges.
